data.title: Add Manual Story Tag Guard section to implementation-plan SKILL.md
data.description:
## Testing Mode
GREEN

## Implementation Notes

Add a "## Manual Story Tag Guard" section to plugins/dso/skills/implementation-plan/SKILL.md, placed after the existing "## Interaction Conflict Gate" section and before "## Step 1: Contextual Discovery".

The section must include all elements to satisfy story DDs:

**Section structure:**

## Manual Story Tag Guard

Before proceeding, check if the story being planned is tagged `manual:awaiting_user`:

1. Check the flag gate: `EXTERNAL_DEP_ENABLED=$(bash "$PLUGIN_SCRIPTS/read-config.sh" planning.external_dependency_block_enabled)`. If the flag is absent, empty, or `false`, skip this gate entirely and proceed normally — baseline behavior is preserved.
2. Run `.claude/scripts/dso ticket show <story-id>` and check the `tags` field for `manual:awaiting_user`.
3. If `manual:awaiting_user` is NOT present: proceed normally (not a manual story).
4. If `manual:awaiting_user` IS present: enter the branching logic below.

### Branching Logic for manual:awaiting_user Stories

**Prep-work detection heuristic**: Check the story's done definitions for references to artifacts that do not yet exist in the codebase — specifically: a verification script path, a user-facing instructions document path, or a CLI wrapper that would need to be authored. Use Glob and `test -f` to check if referenced paths exist.

**Branch A — No prep work needed** (heuristic: done definitions reference no new code artifacts):
- Do NOT decompose the story into tasks.
- Emit a refusal diagnostic explaining that this story is a manual step handled as a unit by sprint.
- Emit: `STATUS:blocked REASON:manual_story_no_prep STORY:<story-id>`
- The manual verification step itself is never decomposed into a task.

**Branch B — Prep work required** (heuristic: done definitions reference at least one artifact not yet in the codebase):
- Decompose ONLY the prep tasks using standard RED/GREEN/UPDATE classification (see Step 3).
- The manual verification step itself is NEVER included as a decomposed task — it is a user-performed action.
- Read the parent epic's External Dependencies block (conforming to `plugins/dso/docs/contracts/external-dependencies-block.md`) to seed prep-task context: use the `name`, `verification_command`, and instructions fields from the relevant block entry to populate prep-task descriptions with real resource names and verification commands rather than invented placeholders.
- Continue to Step 1 (Contextual Discovery) with only the prep tasks in scope.

This is a presence-based check — only activate when `manual:awaiting_user` IS present AND the flag is enabled. Existing stories without this tag are NOT affected.

---

**Key notes for SKILL.md placement:**
- Section heading must be exactly `## Manual Story Tag Guard` (two-pound, space, title)
- Reference to `planning.external_dependency_block_enabled` must appear literally so structural tests can verify it
- Reference to `plugins/dso/docs/contracts/external-dependencies-block.md` must appear literally (referential integrity contract)
- "manual verification step" exclusion language must appear (DD4 structural boundary)
- `STATUS:blocked` must appear in the refusal branch (structural contract for the output)

## TDD Requirement
This task makes the RED tests written in Task T1 turn GREEN. The deliverable is the SKILL.md section addition. No new test task needed for this task itself — T1 is the RED test.

TDD Exemption: Exemption Criterion 3 (static assets / non-executable instruction file). The SKILL.md content is probabilistically interpreted by an LLM; behavioral correctness cannot be deterministically tested. Structural boundary tests (from T1) are the appropriate coverage level per behavioral-testing-standard.md Rule 5.

## Acceptance Criteria

Universal:
- [ ] bash tests/run-all.sh passes (exit 0) after the change — all existing tests still green
  Verify: cd $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel) && bash tests/run-all.sh 2>&1 | tail -5
- [ ] ruff check passes (exit 0) — no Python files modified
  Verify: cd $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel) && ruff check plugins/dso/scripts/*.py 2>/dev/null; true

Task-specific (these assertions pass after T1 test file is committed):
- [ ] "## Manual Story Tag Guard" section heading present in SKILL.md
  Verify: grep -q "^## Manual Story Tag Guard" $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/skills/implementation-plan/SKILL.md
- [ ] planning.external_dependency_block_enabled flag gate reference present in SKILL.md guard section
  Verify: grep -q "planning\.external_dependency_block_enabled" $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/skills/implementation-plan/SKILL.md
- [ ] plugins/dso/docs/contracts/external-dependencies-block.md referenced in SKILL.md guard section (referential integrity)
  Verify: grep -q "external-dependencies-block\.md" $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/skills/implementation-plan/SKILL.md
- [ ] "manual verification step" exclusion language present in SKILL.md guard section
  Verify: grep -q "manual verification step" $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/skills/implementation-plan/SKILL.md
- [ ] STATUS:blocked appears in the SKILL.md guard section (refusal output shape)
  Verify: grep -q "STATUS:blocked" $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/skills/implementation-plan/SKILL.md
- [ ] T1 structural boundary tests all pass GREEN after this task
  Verify: bash $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/hooks/test-implementation-plan-manual-tag-guard.sh 2>&1 | grep "FAILED: 0"
- [ ] check-referential-integrity.sh passes (no dead path references introduced)
  Verify: bash $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/hooks/pre-commit/check-referential-integrity.sh 2>&1 | grep -q "^0 errors" || true
